layout.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A for Marketing, Mode B for Dashboard)

containers.card: bg-[#0F0F1C]/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 hover:border-[#FF2E63]/50 transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF2E63] text-white hover:bg-[#FF2E63]/90 font-orbitron uppercase tracking-wider clip-path-polygon-[0_0,100%_0,100%_80%,90%_100%,0_100%]
buttons.secondary: border border-[#08D9D6] text-[#08D9D6] hover:bg-[#08D9D6]/10 font-mono uppercase tracking-widest

inputs.default: bg-[#16213E] border-white/10 focus:border-[#FF2E63] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF2E63] font-mono text-white placeholder:text-white/30 rounded-none

cards.product: group relative overflow-hidden bg-[#0F0F1C] border border-white/5 hover:border-[#08D9D6]/50 transition-all

effects: Glitch effect on hover for headings
Angled corners (clip-path) for buttons and containers

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure neon text has sufficient contrast against dark backgrounds. Use drop-shadows if needed.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Disable glitch effects and heavy parallax if prefers-reduced-motion is true.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible high-contrast outline (#08D9D6) for keyboard navigation.

tech_stack_specifics.3d_library: React Three Fiber (for Hero section only)

instructions_to_main_agent: OVERRIDE default Shadcn colors in tailwind.config.js with the palette provided above.
IMPORT the Google Fonts in index.css or index.html immediately.
USE 'Orbitron' for all H1-H3 headings and 'Rajdhani' for body text.
IMPLEMENT a 'Scanline' CSS class in index.css for the retro-futuristic background effect.
DO NOT use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. Stick to sharp edges or small rounded-sm for a technical feel.
USE the provided image URLs for placeholders. Do not leave empty gray boxes.
CREATE a 'GlitchText' component for the main hero title.
ENSURE the 'Connect Wallet' button is prominent and uses the Primary Neon Pink color.
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic 'AI slop' designs. Be bold with spacing and contrast.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
